review::.::holistic::cross_module_archit.summary: C-terminal distance calculation duplicated as calculate_cterm_distance and calc_min_cterm_distance

evidence: Uniprot_TMD_search.py defines calculate_cterm_distance(row) which iterates over Transmembrane and Intramembrane columns
